projects.title: AgriGuard: AI-Powered Plant Disease Detection (FYP)
projects.description: Cross-platform mobile app providing offline, real-time plant disease identification for remote farmers.
projects.longDescription: Engineered a hybrid deep learning framework using EfficientNetB3 and TFLite, achieving 94.8% classification accuracy within a 3.1 MB model optimised for low-end Android devices. Implemented a 5-part diagnostic system: severity quantification via pixel-ratio analysis, localised remediation guidance, and multimodal API for out-of-distribution (OOD) species detection. Integrated Firebase for cloud-based Advanced AI scan mode, enabling seamless online/offline fallback for farmers with intermittent connectivity.

projects.title: MediVision: AI-Powered Healthcare Assistant
projects.description: Full-stack cross-platform health tracking app with AI Prescription Scanner and 30-day health trajectory forecasting.
projects.longDescription: Built with secure JWT authentication, role-based access control, and a premium responsive UI across Android and iOS. Integrated an AI Prescription Scanner using OCR to digitise handwritten medical data and queried the FDA Drug Database to alert users of dangerous drug interactions in real time. Developed a predictive linear regression engine in Python to analyse historical patient vitals and forecast 30-day health trajectories, including hypertension and chronic risk scoring. Designed a modular FastAPI backend with SQLite persistence.

projects.title: VaxGuard: AI-Powered Clinical Decision Support System
projects.description: High-fidelity cross-platform diagnostic triage and vaccination management app.
projects.longDescription: Built a high-fidelity cross-platform diagnostic triage and vaccination management app with interactive anatomical mapping UI and multi-language support (English / Urdu). Integrated a WHO 2018 Rabies Protocol-compliant Animal Bite Assessor evaluating bite location and exposure severity, auto-generating personalised Post-Exposure Prophylaxis (PEP) schedules. Built a real-time geospatial Live Outbreak Radar to monitor active disease outbreaks near the user, with push notifications for proximity alerts. Implemented secure local persistence.

projects.title: RunQuest: Gamified Territory Conquest & Fitness App
projects.description: Gamified fitness app where users track real-world runs to claim virtual territories on a live map.
projects.longDescription: Architected a gamified fitness app combining geolocation, health metrics, and multiplayer competition. Engineered territory conquest mechanics using Turf.js and React Native Maps — processing live GPS data to calculate closed-loop paths, polygon areas, and competitive takeovers in real time. Built a live multiplayer ecosystem with Firebase: real-time presence tracking, global team-based leaderboards, and a dynamic activity feed. Designed a premium UI with Zustand state management, Expo Reanimated micro-interactions, real-time weather, and a custom in-app music player.

projects.title: GitHub Repository Explorer
projects.description: Mobile app interfacing with the GitHub REST API to search and explore repositories.
projects.longDescription: Built a mobile app to search and explore repositories by name, language, or owner with infinite-scroll pagination. Engineered efficient async HTTP handling with dynamic filtering to deliver a responsive, non-blocking data experience even on slow connections. Built a local storage ecosystem using SharedPreferences — persisting search history and a favourites system for offline tracking of bookmarked repositories. Designed a glassmorphism-inspired UI with micro-animations, gradient themes, dark/light mode toggle, and bottomsheet modals.

projects.title: Naheed and Sons - Construction & Builders
projects.description: A professional, high-performance corporate website for a leading construction and builders firm.
projects.longDescription: Developed a comprehensive digital presence for Naheed and Sons. The platform serves as a modern portfolio and business acquisition tool, built with Next.js for SSR and SEO optimization, styled with Tailwind CSS, and powered by Supabase for real-time data management. It features an administrative dashboard for managing construction portfolios, client testimonials, and service inquiries.

about.heading: Flutter Developer | Mobile App Development | AI Integration
paragraphs: Software Engineering graduate with 3 internships and a growing portfolio of cross-platform mobile applications. I am a Flutter-first developer with hands-on experience building AI-powered features, Firebase & Supabase backends, and REST API integrations.

I have also built 3 projects in React Native — I am comfortable with both ecosystems, though Flutter is where I do my best work. Eager to contribute to a professional team and keep growing as a mobile developer.
